dashboard.label: Dev Devices
dashboard.description: Development and test endpoints (marked dev=true) are shown here and excluded from production summary statistics.

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | head 1 | eval pm_index=if(isnull(index) OR index=="", "ping", index) | eval pm_sourcetype=if(isnull(sourcetype) OR sourcetype=="", "ping_monitor", sourcetype)
`ping_dev_summaries($pm_index$, $pm_sourcetype$)` | stats count by group | fields group | sort group
`ping_dev_summaries($pm_index$, $pm_sourcetype$)` | search (group="$group_filter$" OR "$group_filter$"="*") | stats dc(target_ip) as total_dev

`ping_dev_summaries($pm_index$, $pm_sourcetype$)` | search (group="$group_filter$" OR "$group_filter$"="*") | stats sum(pings_successful) as success, sum(pings_sent) as total | eval availability=if(total>0, round((success/total)*100, 2), 0) | fields availability

`ping_dev_summaries($pm_index$, $pm_sourcetype$)` | search (group="$group_filter$" OR "$group_filter$"="*") | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss by hostname | where packet_loss > 0 | stats count as hosts_with_loss

`ping_dev_summaries($pm_index$, $pm_sourcetype$)` | search (group="$group_filter$" OR "$group_filter$"="*") | stats latest(_time) as last_seen, latest(target_ip) as target_ip, latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss_pct, latest(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency_ms, latest(group) as group, latest(entitytype) as entitytype, latest(device) as device, latest(vendor) as vendor, latest(description) as description, latest(additional_notes) as additional_notes by hostname | eval status=case( packet_loss_pct==0, "Healthy", packet_loss_pct>0 AND packet_loss_pct<50, "Degraded", packet_loss_pct>=50 AND packet_loss_pct<100, "Critical", packet_loss_pct==100, "Down", true(), "Unknown") | eval avg_latency_ms=round(avg_latency_ms, 2) | eval last_seen=strftime(last_seen, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | sort status, hostname | table hostname, target_ip, status, packet_loss_pct, avg_latency_ms, group, entitytype, device, vendor, description, additional_notes, last_seen
`ping_dev_summaries($pm_index$, $pm_sourcetype$)` | search (group="$group_filter$" OR "$group_filter$"="*") | timechart span=5m avg(eval(100-packet_loss_pct)) as availability
`ping_dev_summaries($pm_index$, $pm_sourcetype$)` avg_latency_ms>0 | search (group="$group_filter$" OR "$group_filter$"="*") | timechart span=5m avg(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency_ms
